name: aidlc-workflow
description: AI-Driven Development Life Cycle (AIDLC) — spec → plan → implement → test → review → ship with state in `.aidlc/state.md` and feedback loop via PR review comments.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node --test test/smoke.test.ts test/parser.test.ts test/classifier.test.ts test/branch.test.ts test/substrate.test.ts test/worktree.test.ts test/bootstrap.test.ts
